message:
feat(google-discovery): add Admin Reports and People policy rules, provisioning surfaces, and discovery aliases

Extend google_policy_matrix.v1.json with full operation-level policy
classification for Admin Reports (admin:reports_v1) and People (people:v1)
APIs, including fail-closed catch-all rules. Add provisioning surfaces with
default scopes, escalation paths (usage-report workflows for admin,
directory/mutation scope escalation for people), and gcloud-assisted +
fallback provisioning steps.

Register admin-reports, people, and contacts service aliases in
ServiceAliasRegistry. Add policy classification tests (deleteContact
requires interactive approval, activities.list requires policy approval)
and provisioning bundle tests verifying default scopes and escalation
triggers for both new services.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "version": "2026-03-06",
-  "generated_from_bead": "flywheel_connectors-lszk.45.1.8.1",
+  "generated_from_bead": "flywheel_connectors-lszk.45.3.7",
   "provisioning_policy": {
     "intent": "Provisioning must keep default scopes narrow, treat consent restrictions as first-class policy, and separate setup-time Google Cloud automation from runtime connector credentials.",
     "default_scope_posture": "Start with the least-broad scope set that supports the selected workflow; widen only on explicit feature selection or a method-level requirement that cannot be satisfied otherwise.",
@@ -164,6 +164,108 @@
           "The current handwritten Calendar connector already separates runtime auth from setup by accepting token or credential_id only; migration should preserve that runtime shape while moving setup logic into the shared substrate."
         ]
       },
+      {
+        "surface_id": "people",
+        "display_name": "Google People/Contacts connector provisioning",
+        "default_scopes": [
+          "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts.readonly"
+        ],
+        "required_api_enablement": [
+          "People API"
+        ],
+        "project_prerequisites": [
+          "OAuth consent screen configured for the selected project.",
+          "OAuth client created for the People user-auth flow used by the host provisioning UX."
+        ],
+        "escalation_paths": [
+          {
+            "trigger": "User enables contact create, update, photo update, or group-membership mutation workflows.",
+            "add_scopes": [
+              "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts"
+            ],
+            "notes": [
+              "Contact mutation requires the broad contacts scope; do not hide this behind read-only flows."
+            ]
+          },
+          {
+            "trigger": "User enables reads from Google-suggested other contacts.",
+            "add_scopes": [
+              "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts.other.readonly"
+            ],
+            "notes": [
+              "Other Contacts is a distinct personal-data surface and should be an explicit opt-in above ordinary contact reads."
+            ]
+          },
+          {
+            "trigger": "User enables Google Workspace directory search or lookup workflows.",
+            "add_scopes": [
+              "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/directory.readonly"
+            ],
+            "notes": [
+              "Directory reads expose org-wide profile data and should remain separate from personal contact access."
+            ]
+          }
+        ],
+        "gcloud_assisted_steps": [
+          "Confirm People API enablement before launching user consent.",
+          "Preflight whether the requested workflow can stay on contacts.readonly before adding contact mutation or directory scopes."
+        ],
+        "fallback_steps": [
+          "Provide manual console steps for People API enablement and OAuth client selection when gcloud cannot manage the project.",
+          "Keep personal-contact, other-contacts, and directory scope choices explicit in the manual fallback path."
+        ],
+        "runtime_materialization": [
+          "Runtime should use credential_id handles or ephemeral access tokens from the shared Google auth chain, never raw local credentials files.",
+          "Provisioning-only auth sources such as ADC may assist setup diagnostics but must not define steady-state connector auth."
+        ],
+        "notes": [
+          "People/Contacts reads are privacy-sensitive even when they are non-mutating, so the connector should expose field-mask and source choices explicitly rather than widening by convenience wrapper.",
+          "Self-profile (`people/me`) access can require additional personal-profile scopes and is intentionally not part of the default contact-read path."
+        ]
+      },
+      {
+        "surface_id": "admin_reports",
+        "display_name": "Google Workspace Admin Reports connector provisioning",
+        "default_scopes": [
+          "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/admin.reports.audit.readonly"
+        ],
+        "required_api_enablement": [
+          "Admin SDK API"
+        ],
+        "project_prerequisites": [
+          "OAuth consent screen configured for the selected project or delegated Workspace-admin auth path.",
+          "A Google Workspace domain administrator or approved delegated-admin credential path exists for the selected tenant.",
+          "The selected tenant permits the requested Admin Reports restricted scopes."
+        ],
+        "escalation_paths": [
+          {
+            "trigger": "User enables usage-report workflows (user, customer, or entity usage metrics).",
+            "add_scopes": [
+              "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/admin.reports.usage.readonly"
+            ],
+            "notes": [
+              "Usage telemetry is a separate restricted admin surface and should not be silently bundled into audit-log access."
+            ]
+          }
+        ],
+        "gcloud_assisted_steps": [
+          "Confirm Admin SDK API enablement for the selected project before launching consent.",
+          "Validate that the selected account or delegated credential path actually has Workspace admin access for the target tenant.",
+          "Preflight whether the requested workflow can stay on audit.readonly or needs the separate usage.readonly scope."
+        ],
+        "fallback_steps": [
+          "Provide manual console steps for Admin SDK API enablement and admin-approved OAuth client selection when gcloud cannot manage the project.",
+          "Do not mark runtime readiness until domain-admin consent or delegated credential materialization succeeds for the selected tenant."
+        ],
+        "runtime_materialization": [
+          "Runtime should use credential_id handles or ephemeral access tokens from the shared Google auth chain; domain-wide delegated service-account material remains a host/provisioning concern.",
+          "Provisioning-only auth sources such as ADC may assist diagnostics but must not silently become steady-state runtime auth for admin connectors."
+        ],
+        "notes": [
+          "Admin Reports is a domain-admin surface, not an end-user personal-data connector; setup must make tenant and admin assumptions explicit.",
+          "Audit and usage scopes should stay separately explainable because many environments will permit one but not the other."
+        ]
+      },
       {
         "surface_id": "workspace_events",
         "display_name": "Google Workspace Events + Pub/Sub provisioning",
@@ -725,6 +827,73 @@
         }
       ]
     },
+    {
+      "service": "admin",
+      "api_versions": ["reports_v1"],
+      "recommended_zones": ["z:work"],
+      "host_allow": ["admin.googleapis.com"],
+      "exceptions": [
+        "Admin Reports is domain-wide and admin-only; the connector must keep tenant and delegated-admin assumptions explicit.",
+        "Audit and usage scopes are separate restricted surfaces and should not be silently bundled."
+      ],
+      "rules": [
+        {
+          "operation_pattern": "activities.list",
+          "capability": "admin.reports.audit.read",
+          "risk_level": "high",
+          "safety_tier": "safe",
+          "approval_mode": "policy",
+          "required_scopes": ["https://www.googleapis.com/auth/admin.reports.audit.readonly"],
+          "notes": [
+            "Domain-wide audit logs are read-only but sensitive enough that host policy should approve and zone the call explicitly."
+          ]
+        },
+        {
+          "operation_pattern": "userUsageReport.get",
+          "capability": "admin.reports.usage.read",
+          "risk_level": "high",
+          "safety_tier": "safe",
+          "approval_mode": "policy",
+          "required_scopes": ["https://www.googleapis.com/auth/admin.reports.usage.readonly"],
+          "notes": [
+            "User usage reports expose organization-level productivity telemetry and should stay outside the default audit-only posture."
+          ]
+        },
+        {
+          "operation_pattern": "customerUsageReports.get",
+          "capability": "admin.reports.usage.read",
+          "risk_level": "high",
+          "safety_tier": "safe",
+          "approval_mode": "policy",
+          "required_scopes": ["https://www.googleapis.com/auth/admin.reports.usage.readonly"],
+          "notes": [
+            "Customer-wide usage reports summarize domain activity and should remain explicitly policy-gated."
+          ]
+        },
+        {
+          "operation_pattern": "entityUsageReports.get",
+          "capability": "admin.reports.usage.read",
+          "risk_level": "high",
+          "safety_tier": "safe",
+          "approval_mode": "policy",
+          "required_scopes": ["https://www.googleapis.com/auth/admin.reports.usage.readonly"],
+          "notes": [
+            "Entity usage reports are niche but still admin-only telemetry and should fail closed without explicit policy mapping."
+          ]
+        },
+        {
+          "operation_pattern": "*",
+          "capability": "google.review_required",
+          "risk_level": "high",
+          "safety_tier": "forbidden",
+          "approval_mode": "interactive",
+          "required_scopes": [],
+          "notes": [
+            "Fail closed for unmapped methods until explicit policy classification is added."
+          ]
+        }
+      ]
+    },
     {
       "service": "generativelanguage",
       "api_versions": ["v1", "v1beta"],
@@ -1014,6 +1183,237 @@
         }
       ]
     },
+    {
+      "service": "people",
+      "api_versions": ["v1"],
+      "recommended_zones": ["z:private", "z:work"],
+      "host_allow": ["people.googleapis.com"],
+      "exceptions": [
+        "People field masks materially change the sensitivity of returned data and must stay explicit in connector UX rather than hidden behind broad defaults.",
+        "Self-profile reads (`people/me`) can require additional personal-profile scopes beyond contacts.readonly and should remain an explicit separate choice."
+      ],
+      "rules": [
+        {
+          "operation_pattern": "people.deleteContact",
+          "capability": "people.contacts.delete",
+          "risk_level": "critical",
+          "safety_tier": "dangerous",
+          "approval_mode": "interactive",
+          "required_scopes": ["https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts"],
+          "notes": [
+            "Permanent contact deletion is user-visible data loss and should require explicit confirmation."
+          ]
+        },
+        {
+          "operation_pattern": "people.batchDeleteContacts",
+          "capability": "people.contacts.delete",
+          "risk_level": "critical",
+          "safety_tier": "dangerous",
+          "approval_mode": "interactive",
+          "required_scopes": ["https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts"],
+          "notes": [
+            "Bulk contact deletion should never ride on the default read-only posture."
+          ]
+        },
+        {
+          "operation_pattern": "people.createContact",
+          "capability": "people.contacts.write",
+          "risk_level": "high",
+          "safety_tier": "risky",
+          "approval_mode": "policy",
+          "required_scopes": ["https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts"],
+          "notes": [
+            "Contact creation writes durable personal data and should stay outside the default read-only path."
+          ]
+        },
+        {
+          "operation_pattern": "people.updateContact",
+          "capability": "people.contacts.write",
+          "risk_level": "high",
+          "safety_tier": "risky",
+          "approval_mode": "policy",
+          "required_scopes": ["https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts"],
+          "notes": [
+            "Contact updates should keep field-mask changes explicit so the caller knows which personal fields are being mutated."
+          ]
+        },
+        {
+          "operation_pattern": "people.batchCreateContacts",
+          "capability": "people.contacts.write",
+          "risk_level": "high",
+          "safety_tier": "risky",
+          "approval_mode": "policy",
+          "required_scopes": ["https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts"],
+          "notes": []
+        },
+        {
+          "operation_pattern": "people.batchUpdateContacts",
+          "capability": "people.contacts.write",
+          "risk_level": "high",
+          "safety_tier": "risky",
+          "approval_mode": "policy",
+          "required_scopes": ["https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts"],
+          "notes": []
+        },
+        {
+          "operation_pattern": "people.updateContactPhoto",
+          "capability": "people.contacts.write",
+          "risk_level": "high",
+          "safety_tier": "risky",
+          "approval_mode": "policy",
+          "required_scopes": ["https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts"],
+          "notes": [
+            "Photo updates still mutate durable personal profile data."
+          ]
+        },
+        {
+          "operation_pattern": "people.get",
+          "capability": "people.profile.read",
+          "risk_level": "medium",
+          "safety_tier": "safe",
+          "approval_mode": "policy",
+          "required_scopes": [
+            "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts.readonly",
+            "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts",
+            "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/directory.readonly",
+            "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/userinfo.email",
+            "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/userinfo.profile"
+          ],
+          "notes": [
+            "Exact scope needs depend on the resource and requested personFields; self-profile reads should stay explicit."
+          ]
+        },
+        {
+          "operation_pattern": "people.getBatchGet",
+          "capability": "people.profile.read",
+          "risk_level": "medium",
+          "safety_tier": "safe",
+          "approval_mode": "policy",
+          "required_scopes": [
+            "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts.readonly",
+            "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts",
+            "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/directory.readonly",
+            "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/userinfo.email",
+            "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/userinfo.profile"
+          ],
+          "notes": [
+            "Batch profile reads amplify privacy impact even when they are non-mutating."
+          ]
+        },
+        {
+          "operation_pattern": "people.connections.list",
+          "capability": "people.contacts.read",
+          "risk_level": "medium",
+          "safety_tier": "safe",
+          "approval_mode": "policy",
+          "required_scopes": [
+            "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts.readonly",
+            "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts"
+          ],
+          "notes": [
+            "Bulk contact enumeration is privacy-sensitive even without mutation."
+          ]
+        },
+        {
+          "operation_pattern": "people.searchContacts",
+          "capability": "people.contacts.read",
+          "risk_level": "medium",
+          "safety_tier": "safe",
+          "approval_mode": "policy",
+          "required_scopes": [
+            "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts.readonly",
+            "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts"
+          ],
+          "notes": []
+        },
+        {
+          "operation_pattern": "otherContacts.*",
+          "capability": "people.other_contacts.read",
+          "risk_level": "medium",
+          "safety_tier": "safe",
+          "approval_mode": "policy",
+          "required_scopes": [
+            "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts.other.readonly"
+          ],
+          "notes": [
+            "Other Contacts is a separate auto-suggested contact corpus and should remain an explicit opt-in."
+          ]
+        },
+        {
+          "operation_pattern": "people.listDirectoryPeople",
+          "capability": "people.directory.read",
+          "risk_level": "medium",
+          "safety_tier": "safe",
+          "approval_mode": "policy",
+          "required_scopes": [
+            "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/directory.readonly"
+          ],
+          "notes": [
+            "Directory lookups expose org-wide profile data rather than just the user's contacts."
+          ]
+        },
+        {
+          "operation_pattern": "people.searchDirectoryPeople",
+          "capability": "people.directory.read",
+          "risk_level": "medium",
+          "safety_tier": "safe",
+          "approval_mode": "policy",
+          "required_scopes": [
+            "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/directory.readonly"
+          ],
+          "notes": [
+            "Directory search should stay policy-gated because it broadens discovery across the workspace."
+          ]
+        },
+        {
+          "operation_pattern": "contactGroups.batchGet",
+          "capability": "people.contact_groups.read",
+          "risk_level": "medium",
+          "safety_tier": "safe",
+          "approval_mode": "policy",
+          "required_scopes": [
+            "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts.readonly",
+            "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts"
+          ],
+          "notes": []
+        },
+        {
+          "operation_pattern": "contactGroups.get",
+          "capability": "people.contact_groups.read",
+          "risk_level": "medium",
+          "safety_tier": "safe",
+          "approval_mode": "policy",
+          "required_scopes": [
+            "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts.readonly",
+            "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts"
+          ],
+          "notes": []
+        },
+        {
+          "operation_pattern": "contactGroups.list",
+          "capability": "people.contact_groups.read",
+          "risk_level": "medium",
+          "safety_tier": "safe",
+          "approval_mode": "policy",
+          "required_scopes": [
+            "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts.readonly",
+            "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/contacts"
+          ],
+          "notes": []
+        },
+        {
+          "operation_pattern": "*",
+          "capability": "google.review_required",
+          "risk_level": "high",
+          "safety_tier": "forbidden",
+          "approval_mode": "interactive",
+          "required_scopes": [],
+          "notes": [
+            "Fail closed for unmapped methods until explicit policy classification is added."
+          ]
+        }
+      ]
+    },
     {
       "service": "youtube",
       "api_versions": ["v3"],

@@ -249,6 +249,18 @@ impl Default for ServiceAliasRegistry {
             "drive".to_string(),
             DiscoveryServiceId::new("drive", "v3").expect("static alias must be valid"),
         );
+        aliases.insert(
+            "admin-reports".to_string(),
+            DiscoveryServiceId::new("admin", "reports_v1").expect("static alias must be valid"),
+        );
+        aliases.insert(
+            "people".to_string(),
+            DiscoveryServiceId::new("people", "v1").expect("static alias must be valid"),
+        );
+        aliases.insert(
+            "contacts".to_string(),
+            DiscoveryServiceId::new("people", "v1").expect("static alias must be valid"),
+        );
         aliases.insert(
             "docs".to_string(),
             DiscoveryServiceId::new("docs", "v1").expect("static alias must be valid"),
@@ -1395,6 +1407,9 @@ mod tests {
             "youtube",
             "bigquery",
             "drive",
+            "admin-reports",
+            "people",
+            "contacts",
             "docs",
             "sheets",
             "google-ai",
